Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prooftreeui

Class RuleDetailsProvider

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prooftreeui.RuleDetailsProvider
public class RuleDetailsProvider extends Object
Class used to compute rule information to be displayed and traverse them in order to display them.
